title: BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
